summary: Board correction: wiring shipped in 5c2a4622 while the card was still in todo (lifecycle violation — implementation must pass through doing). Card is now an umbrella; UI split to MPI-306.

Head Swap umbrella CLOSED. Wiring shipped (5c2a4622), MpiNodes node-lock shipped (MPI-309 done), remote-proven in the MPI-324 Pod sweep (RTX 2000, app_head_swap ran clean, correct swap saved). Residuals tracked separately: UI carousel = MPI-306, box-outside-frame auto-pad = MPI-325. Umbrella has no untracked open work.
